headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock on Our Buy List and 2 That Underwhelm
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.

headline: Telecom stocks have had a great start to the year — and they’re still quite cheap
summary: Several companies in the S 500’s communications sector trade at low price-to-earnings valuations, with attractive dividend yields well supported by cash flow.
